creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 207000
poudriere build log of geeqie failing to build

The port graphics/geeqie fails to build for me because of a patch error. 

The error is shown below:

===>  Patching for geeqie-1.5.1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for geeqie-1.5.1
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
4 out of 4 hunks ignored--saving rejects to src/exiv2.cc.rej
=> FreeBSD patch patch-git_f9213c failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es)  patch-Makefile.am patch-configure.ac applied cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/geeqie
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for geeqie-1.5.1
build of graphics/geeqie | geeqie-1.5.1 ended at Thu Aug 29 11:52:38 EDT 2019
build time: 00:00:04
!!! build failure encountered !!!
